description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a medium build, depicted in a casual urban outfit. He wears a short-sleeved t-shirt with a round neckline and fitted cuffs, paired with straight-cut pants that have visible seam details. His shoes are low-profile and slip-on, with a distinct sole and upper separation. The figure's arms are relaxed at his sides, and his hands are open with fingers slightly curved. His hair is neatly styled, short, and combed back, giving a clean and tidy appearance. The overall look is modern and suitable for everyday city environments.
description: A stylized adult male in casual attire, featuring a t-shirt, straight pants, and slip-on shoes, with neatly styled short hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, chest pocket detail on the t-shirt, and the relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the t-shirt and pants, and the shoe's side profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the t-shirt's back seam, and the pants' rear pockets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the natural stance of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and straight-cut pants
